The value MUST be one of <code>"string"</code>, <code>"number"</code>, <code>"integer"</code>, <code>"boolean"</code>, <code>"array"</code> or <code>"file"</code>. If <code>type</code> is <code>"file"</code>, the <a href="#operationConsumes"><code>consumes</code></a> MUST be either <code>"multipart/form-data"</code>, <code>" application/x-www-form-urlencoded"</code> or both and the parameter MUST be <a href="#parameterIn"><code>in</code></a> <code>"formData"</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterformat"></a>format</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The extending format for the previously mentioned <a href="#parameterType"><code>type</code></a>. See <a href="#dataTypeFormat">Data Type Formats</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterallowemptyvalue">allowEmptyValue</a></td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters. This is valid only for either <code>query</code> or <code>formData</code> parameters and allows you to send a parameter with a name only or  an empty value. Default value is <code>false</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameteritems"></a>items</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#items-object">Items Object</a></td>
<td><strong>Required if <a href="#parameterType"><code>type</code></a> is "array".</strong> Describes the type of items in the array.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parametercollectionformat"></a>collectionFormat</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Determines the format of the array if type array is used. Possible values are: <ul dir="auto"><li><code>csv</code> - comma separated values <code>foo,bar</code>. </li><li><code>ssv</code> - space separated values <code>foo bar</code>. </li><li><code>tsv</code> - tab separated values <code>foo\tbar</code>. </li><li><code>pipes</code> - pipe separated values <code>foo|bar</code>. </li><li><code>multi</code> - corresponds to multiple parameter instances instead of multiple values for a single instance <code>foo=bar&amp;foo=baz</code>. This is valid only for parameters <a href="#parameterIn"><code>in</code></a> "query" or "formData". </li></ul> Default value is <code>csv</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterdefault"></a>default</td>
<td align="center">*</td>
<td>Declares the value of the parameter that the server will use if none is provided, for example a "count" to control the number of results per page might default to 100 if not supplied by the client in the request. (Note: "default" has no meaning for required parameters.)  See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2</a>. Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <a href="#parameterType"><code>type</code></a> for this parameter.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parametermaximum"></a>maximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterexclusivemaximum"></a>exclusiveMaximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterminimum"></a>minimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterexclusiveminimum"></a>exclusiveMinimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parametermaxlength"></a>maxLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterminlength"></a>minLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterpattern"></a>pattern</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parametermaxitems"></a>maxItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterminitems"></a>minItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameteruniqueitems"></a>uniqueItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterenum"></a>enum</td>
<td align="center">[*]</td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parametermultipleof"></a>multipleOf</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-2" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-2"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-parameterextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Parameter Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-parameter-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Parameter Object Examples" href="#parameter-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Body Parameters</h6><a id="user-content-body-parameters" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Body Parameters" href="#body-parameters"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A body parameter with a referenced schema definition (normally for a model definition):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;user&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;body&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;user to add to the system&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: true,
  &quot;schema&quot;: {
    &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/User&quot;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"user"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"body"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"user to add to the system"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/User"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: user
in: body
description: user to add to the system
required: true
schema:
  $ref: '#/definitions/User'"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">user</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">body</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">user to add to the system</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/User<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">A body parameter that is an array of string values:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;user&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;body&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;user to add to the system&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: true,
  &quot;schema&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"user"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"body"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"user to add to the system"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: user
in: body
description: user to add to the system
required: true
schema:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">user</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">body</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">user to add to the system</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Other Parameters</h6><a id="user-content-other-parameters" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Other Parameters" href="#other-parameters"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A header parameter with an array of 64 bit integer numbers:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;token&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;header&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;token to be passed as a header&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: true,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
  &quot;items&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
    &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int64&quot;
  },
  &quot;collectionFormat&quot;: &quot;csv&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"token"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"header"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"token to be passed as a header"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"int64"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"collectionFormat"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"csv"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: token
in: header
description: token to be passed as a header
required: true
type: array
items:
  type: integer
  format: int64
collectionFormat: csv"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">token</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">header</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">token to be passed as a header</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
<span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int64</span>
<span class="pl-ent">collectionFormat</span>: <span class="pl-s">csv</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">A path parameter of a string value:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;username&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;path&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;username to fetch&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: true,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"username"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"path"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"username to fetch"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: username
in: path
description: username to fetch
required: true
type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">username</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">path</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">username to fetch</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">An optional query parameter of a string value, allowing multiple values by repeating the query parameter:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;id&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;query&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;ID of the object to fetch&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: false,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
  &quot;items&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
  },
  &quot;collectionFormat&quot;: &quot;multi&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"id"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"query"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"ID of the object to fetch"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"collectionFormat"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"multi"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: id
in: query
description: ID of the object to fetch
required: false
type: array
items:
  type: string
collectionFormat: multi"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">id</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">query</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">ID of the object to fetch</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>
<span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
<span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
<span class="pl-ent">collectionFormat</span>: <span class="pl-s">multi</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">A form data with file type for a file upload:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;avatar&quot;,
  &quot;in&quot;: &quot;formData&quot;,
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The avatar of the user&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: true,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;file&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"avatar"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"in"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"formData"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The avatar of the user"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"file"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="name: avatar
in: formData
description: The avatar of the user
required: true
type: file"><pre><span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">avatar</span>
<span class="pl-ent">in</span>: <span class="pl-s">formData</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The avatar of the user</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">file</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Items Object</h4><a id="user-content-items-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Items Object" href="#items-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A limited subset of JSON-Schema's items object. It is used by parameter definitions that are not located <a href="#parameterIn"><code>in</code></a> <code>"body"</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-8" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-8"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemstype"></a>type</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>Required.</strong> The internal type of the array. The value MUST be one of <code>"string"</code>, <code>"number"</code>, <code>"integer"</code>, <code>"boolean"</code>, or <code>"array"</code>. Files and models are not allowed.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsformat"></a>format</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The extending format for the previously mentioned <a href="#parameterType"><code>type</code></a>. See <a href="#dataTypeFormat">Data Type Formats</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsitems"></a>items</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#items-object">Items Object</a></td>
<td><strong>Required if <a href="#itemsType"><code>type</code></a> is "array".</strong> Describes the type of items in the array.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemscollectionformat"></a>collectionFormat</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Determines the format of the array if type array is used. Possible values are: <ul dir="auto"><li><code>csv</code> - comma separated values <code>foo,bar</code>. </li><li><code>ssv</code> - space separated values <code>foo bar</code>. </li><li><code>tsv</code> - tab separated values <code>foo\tbar</code>. </li><li><code>pipes</code> - pipe separated values <code>foo|bar</code>. </li></ul> Default value is <code>csv</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsdefault"></a>default</td>
<td align="center">*</td>
<td>Declares the value of the item that the server will use if none is provided. (Note: "default" has no meaning for required items.) See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2</a>. Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <a href="#itemsType"><code>type</code></a> for the data type.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsmaximum"></a>maximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsmaximum"></a>exclusiveMaximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsminimum"></a>minimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsexclusiveminimum"></a>exclusiveMinimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsmaxlength"></a>maxLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsminlength"></a>minLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemspattern"></a>pattern</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsmaxitems"></a>maxItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsminitems"></a>minItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsuniqueitems"></a>uniqueItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsenum"></a>enum</td>
<td align="center">[*]</td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsmultipleof"></a>multipleOf</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Objects</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-objects-6" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Objects" href="#patterned-objects-6"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-itemsextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Items Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-items-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Items Object Examples" href="#items-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Items must be of type  string and have the minimum length of  2 characters:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
    &quot;minLength&quot;: 2
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"minLength"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">2</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: string
minLength: 2"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
<span class="pl-ent">minLength</span>: <span class="pl-c1">2</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">An array of arrays, the internal array being of type integer, numbers must be between 0 and 63 (inclusive):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
        &quot;minimum&quot;: 0,
        &quot;maximum&quot;: 63
    }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"maximum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">63</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: array
items:
  type: integer
  minimum: 0
  maximum: 63"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
<span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">minimum</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">maximum</span>: <span class="pl-c1">63</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Responses Object</h4><a id="user-content-responses-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Responses Object" href="#responses-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A container for the expected responses of an operation. The container maps a HTTP response code to the expected response. It is not expected from the documentation to necessarily cover all possible HTTP response codes, since they may not be known in advance. However, it is expected from the documentation to cover a successful operation response and any known errors.</p>
<p dir="auto">The <code>default</code> can be used as the default response object for all HTTP codes that are not covered individually by the specification.</p>
<p dir="auto">The <code>Responses Object</code> MUST contain at least one response code, and it SHOULD be the response for a successful operation call.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-9" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-9"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsesdefault"></a>default</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#response-object">Response Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a></td>
<td>The documentation of responses other than the ones declared for specific HTTP response codes. It can be used to cover undeclared responses. <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a> can be used to link to a response that is defined at the <a href="#swaggerResponses">Swagger Object's responses</a> section.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-3" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-3"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsescode"></a>{<a href="#http-status-codes">HTTP Status Code</a>}</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#response-object">Response Object</a> | <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a></td>
<td>Any <a href="#http-status-codes">HTTP status code</a> can be used as the property name (one property per HTTP status code). Describes the expected response for that HTTP status code.  <a href="#reference-object">Reference Object</a> can be used to link to a response that is defined at the <a href="#swaggerResponses">Swagger Object's responses</a> section.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsesextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Responses Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-responses-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Responses Object Example" href="#responses-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A 200 response for successful operation and a default response for others (implying an error):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;200&quot;: {
    &quot;description&quot;: &quot;a pet to be returned&quot;,
    &quot;schema&quot;: {
      &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/Pet&quot;
    }
  },
  &quot;default&quot;: {
    &quot;description&quot;: &quot;Unexpected error&quot;,
    &quot;schema&quot;: {
      &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/ErrorModel&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"200"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"a pet to be returned"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/Pet"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Unexpected error"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/ErrorModel"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="'200':
  description: a pet to be returned
  schema:
    $ref: '#/definitions/Pet'
default:
  description: Unexpected error
  schema:
    $ref: '#/definitions/ErrorModel'"><pre><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-ent">200</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">a pet to be returned</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
<span class="pl-ent">default</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">Unexpected error</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/ErrorModel<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Response Object</h4><a id="user-content-response-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Response Object" href="#response-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Describes a single response from an API Operation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-10" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-10"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responsedescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>Required.</strong> A short description of the response. <a href="https://guides.github.com/features/mastering-markdown/#GitHub-flavored-markdown">GFM syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responseschema"></a>schema</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a></td>
<td>A definition of the response structure. It can be a primitive, an array or an object. If this field does not exist, it means no content is returned as part of the response. As an extension to the <a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a>, its root <code>type</code> value may also be <code>"file"</code>. This SHOULD be accompanied by a relevant <code>produces</code> mime-type.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responseheaders"></a>headers</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#headers-object">Headers Object</a></td>
<td>A list of headers that are sent with the response.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responseexamples"></a>examples</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#example-object">Example Object</a></td>
<td>An example of the response message.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Objects</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-objects-7" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Objects" href="#patterned-objects-7"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-responseextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Response Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-response-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Response Object Examples" href="#response-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Response of an array of a complex type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A complex object array response&quot;,
  &quot;schema&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/VeryComplexType&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"A complex object array response"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/VeryComplexType"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A complex object array response
schema:
  type: array
  items:
    $ref: '#/definitions/VeryComplexType'"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A complex object array response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/VeryComplexType<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response with a string type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A simple string response&quot;,
  &quot;schema&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"A simple string response"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A simple string response
schema:
  type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A simple string response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response with headers:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A simple string response&quot;,
  &quot;schema&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
  },
  &quot;headers&quot;: {
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Limit&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of allowed requests in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Remaining&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of remaining requests in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Reset&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of seconds left in the current period&quot;,
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"A simple string response"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"schema"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"headers"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Limit"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of allowed requests in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Remaining"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of remaining requests in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Reset"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of seconds left in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: A simple string response
schema:
  type: string
headers:
  X-Rate-Limit-Limit:
    description: The number of allowed requests in the current period
    type: integer
  X-Rate-Limit-Remaining:
    description: The number of remaining requests in the current period
    type: integer
  X-Rate-Limit-Reset:
    description: The number of seconds left in the current period
    type: integer"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A simple string response</span>
<span class="pl-ent">schema</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
<span class="pl-ent">headers</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Limit</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of allowed requests in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Remaining</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of remaining requests in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Reset</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of seconds left in the current period</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response with no return value:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;object created&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object created"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: object created"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">object created</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Headers Object</h4><a id="user-content-headers-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Headers Object" href="#headers-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Lists the headers that can be sent as part of a response.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-4" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-4"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headersname"></a>{name}</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#header-object">Header Object</a></td>
<td>The name of the property corresponds to the name of the header. The value describes the type of the header.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Headers Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-headers-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Headers Object Example" href="#headers-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Rate-limit headers:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Limit&quot;: {
        &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of allowed requests in the current period&quot;,
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Remaining&quot;: {
        &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of remaining requests in the current period&quot;,
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    },
    &quot;X-Rate-Limit-Reset&quot;: {
        &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of seconds left in the current period&quot;,
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
    }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Limit"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of allowed requests in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Remaining"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of remaining requests in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"X-Rate-Limit-Reset"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of seconds left in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="X-Rate-Limit-Limit:
  description: The number of allowed requests in the current period
  type: integer
X-Rate-Limit-Remaining:
  description: The number of remaining requests in the current period
  type: integer
X-Rate-Limit-Reset:
  description: The number of seconds left in the current period
  type: integer"><pre><span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Limit</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of allowed requests in the current period</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
<span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Remaining</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of remaining requests in the current period</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
<span class="pl-ent">X-Rate-Limit-Reset</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of seconds left in the current period</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Example Object</h4><a id="user-content-example-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Example Object" href="#example-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Allows sharing examples for operation responses.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-5" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-5"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-examplemimetype"></a>{<a href="#mime-types">mime type</a>}</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>The name of the property MUST be one of the Operation <code>produces</code> values (either implicit or inherited). The value SHOULD be an example of what such a response would look like.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Example Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-example-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Example Object Example" href="#example-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Example response for application/json mimetype of a Pet data type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;application/json&quot;: {
    &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Puma&quot;,
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;Dog&quot;,
    &quot;color&quot;: &quot;Black&quot;,
    &quot;gender&quot;: &quot;Female&quot;,
    &quot;breed&quot;: &quot;Mixed&quot;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"application/json"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Puma"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Dog"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"color"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Black"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"gender"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Female"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"breed"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Mixed"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="application/json:
  name: Puma
  type: Dog
  color: Black
  gender: Female
  breed: Mixed"><pre><span class="pl-ent">application/json</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">Puma</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">Dog</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">color</span>: <span class="pl-s">Black</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">gender</span>: <span class="pl-s">Female</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">breed</span>: <span class="pl-s">Mixed</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Header Object</h4><a id="user-content-header-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Header Object" href="#header-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerdescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>A short description of the header.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headertype"></a>type</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>Required.</strong> The type of the object. The value MUST be one of <code>"string"</code>, <code>"number"</code>, <code>"integer"</code>, <code>"boolean"</code>, or <code>"array"</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerformat"></a>format</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The extending format for the previously mentioned <a href="#stType"><code>type</code></a>. See <a href="#dataTypeFormat">Data Type Formats</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headeritems"></a>items</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#items-object">Items Object</a></td>
<td><strong>Required if <a href="#stType"><code>type</code></a> is "array".</strong> Describes the type of items in the array.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headercollectionformat"></a>collectionFormat</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Determines the format of the array if type array is used. Possible values are: <ul dir="auto"><li><code>csv</code> - comma separated values <code>foo,bar</code>. </li><li><code>ssv</code> - space separated values <code>foo bar</code>. </li><li><code>tsv</code> - tab separated values <code>foo\tbar</code>. </li><li><code>pipes</code> - pipe separated values <code>foo|bar</code>. </li></ul> Default value is <code>csv</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerdefault"></a>default</td>
<td align="center">*</td>
<td>Declares the value of the header that the server will use if none is provided. (Note: "default" has no meaning for required headers.) See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-6.2</a>. Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <a href="#headerDefault"><code>type</code></a> for the header.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headermaximum"></a>maximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headermaximum"></a>exclusiveMaximum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerminimum"></a>minimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerexclusiveminimum"></a>exclusiveMinimum</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headermaxlength"></a>maxLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerminlength"></a>minLength</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerpattern"></a>pattern</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.2.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headermaxitems"></a>maxItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.2</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerminitems"></a>minItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>integer</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.3</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headeruniqueitems"></a>uniqueItems</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td><a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.3.4</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerenum"></a>enum</td>
<td align="center">[*]</td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.5.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headermultipleof"></a>multipleOf</td>
<td align="center"><code>number</code></td>
<td>See <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1" rel="nofollow">https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00#section-5.1.1</a>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
