<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-headerextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Header Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-header-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Header Object Example" href="#header-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A simple header with of an integer type:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The number of allowed requests in the current period&quot;,
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The number of allowed requests in the current period"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="description: The number of allowed requests in the current period
type: integer"><pre><span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The number of allowed requests in the current period</span>
<span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tag Object</h4><a id="user-content-tag-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tag Object" href="#tag-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Allows adding meta data to a single tag that is used by the <a href="#operation-object">Operation Object</a>. It is not mandatory to have a Tag Object per tag used there.</p>

<td><a name="user-content-tagname"></a>name</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td><strong>Required.</strong> The name of the tag.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-tagdescription"></a>description</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>A short description for the tag. <a href="https://guides.github.com/features/mastering-markdown/#GitHub-flavored-markdown">GFM syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-tagexternaldocs"></a>externalDocs</td>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Reference Object</h4><a id="user-content-reference-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Reference Object" href="#reference-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A simple object to allow referencing other definitions in the specification. It can be used to reference parameters and responses that are defined at the top level for reuse.</p>
<p dir="auto">The Reference Object is a <a href="http://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-pbryan-zyp-json-ref-02" rel="nofollow">JSON Reference</a> that uses a <a href="http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6901" rel="nofollow">JSON Pointer</a> as its value. For this specification, only <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-zyp-json-schema-04#section-7.2.3" rel="nofollow">canonical dereferencing</a> is supported.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-12" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-12"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Schema Object</h4><a id="user-content-schema-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Schema Object" href="#schema-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The Schema Object allows the definition of input and output data types. These types can be objects, but also primitives and arrays. This object is based on the <a href="http://json-schema.org/" rel="nofollow">JSON Schema Specification Draft 4</a> and uses a predefined subset of it. On top of this subset, there are extensions provided by this specification to allow for more complete documentation.</p>
<p dir="auto">Further information about the properties can be found in <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-zyp-json-schema-04" rel="nofollow">JSON Schema Core</a> and <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-fge-json-schema-validation-00" rel="nofollow">JSON Schema Validation</a>. Unless stated otherwise, the property definitions follow the JSON Schema specification as referenced here.</p>
<p dir="auto">The following properties are taken directly from the JSON Schema definition and follow the same specifications:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>$ref - As a <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-pbryan-zyp-json-ref-03" rel="nofollow">JSON Reference</a></li>
<li>format (See <a href="#dataTypeFormat">Data Type Formats</a> for further details)</li>
<li>title</li>
<li>description (<a href="https://guides.github.com/features/mastering-markdown/#GitHub-flavored-markdown">GFM syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation)</li>
<li>default (Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object)</li>
<li>multipleOf</li>
<li>maximum</li>
<li>exclusiveMaximum</li>
<li>minimum</li>
<li>exclusiveMinimum</li>
<li>maxLength</li>
<li>minLength</li>
<li>pattern</li>
<li>maxItems</li>
<li>minItems</li>
<li>uniqueItems</li>
<li>maxProperties</li>
<li>minProperties</li>
<li>required</li>
<li>enum</li>
<li>type</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">The following properties are taken from the JSON Schema definition but their definitions were adjusted to the Swagger Specification. Their definition is the same as the one from JSON Schema, only where the original definition references the JSON Schema definition, the <a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a> definition is used instead.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>items</li>
<li>allOf</li>
<li>properties</li>
<li>additionalProperties</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Other than the JSON Schema subset fields, the following fields may be used for further schema documentation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-13" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-13"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemadiscriminator"></a>discriminator</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Adds support for polymorphism. The discriminator is the schema property name that is used to differentiate between other schema that inherit this schema. The property name used MUST be defined at this schema and it MUST be in the <code>required</code> property list. When used, the value MUST be the name of this schema or any schema that inherits it.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemareadonly"></a>readOnly</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Relevant only for Schema <code>"properties"</code> definitions. Declares the property as "read only". This means that it MAY be sent as part of a response but MUST NOT be sent as part of the request. Properties marked as <code>readOnly</code> being <code>true</code> SHOULD NOT be in the <code>required</code> list of the defined schema. Default value is <code>false</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemaxml"></a>xml</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#xml-object">XML Object</a></td>
<td>This MAY be used only on properties schemas. It has no effect on root schemas. Adds Additional metadata to describe the XML representation format of this property.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemaexternaldocs"></a>externalDocs</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#external-documentation-object">External Documentation Object</a></td>
<td>Additional external documentation for this schema.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemaexample"></a>example</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>A free-form property to include an example of an instance for this schema.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Objects</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-objects-9" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Objects" href="#patterned-objects-9"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-schemaextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Composition and Inheritance (Polymorphism)</h6><a id="user-content-composition-and-inheritance-polymorphism" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Composition and Inheritance (Polymorphism)" href="#composition-and-inheritance-polymorphism"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Swagger allows combining and extending model definitions using the <code>allOf</code> property of JSON Schema, in effect offering model composition. <code>allOf</code> takes in an array of object definitions that are validated <em>independently</em> but together compose a single object.</p>
<p dir="auto">While composition offers model extensibility, it does not imply a hierarchy between the models. To support polymorphism, Swagger adds the support of the <code>discriminator</code> field. When used, the <code>discriminator</code> will be the name of the property used to decide which schema definition is used to validate the structure of the model. As such, the <code>discriminator</code> field MUST be a required field. The value of the chosen property has to be the friendly name given to the model under the <code>definitions</code> property. As such, inline schema definitions, which do not have a given id, <em>cannot</em> be used in polymorphism.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Modeling</h6><a id="user-content-xml-modeling" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Modeling" href="#xml-modeling"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The <a href="#schemaXml">xml</a> property allows extra definitions when translating the JSON definition to XML. The <a href="#xml-object">XML Object</a> contains additional information about the available options.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Schema Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-schema-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Schema Object Examples" href="#schema-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Primitive Sample</h6><a id="user-content-primitive-sample" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Primitive Sample" href="#primitive-sample"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Unlike previous versions of Swagger, Schema definitions can be used to describe primitive and arrays as well.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
    &quot;format&quot;: &quot;email&quot;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"email"</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: string
format: email"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
<span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">email</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Simple Model</h6><a id="user-content-simple-model" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Simple Model" href="#simple-model"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
  &quot;required&quot;: [
    &quot;name&quot;
  ],
  &quot;properties&quot;: {
    &quot;name&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;address&quot;: {
      &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/Address&quot;
    },
    &quot;age&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
      &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int32&quot;,
      &quot;minimum&quot;: 0
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"properties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"address"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/Address"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"age"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"int32"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: object
required:
- name
properties:
  name:
    type: string
  address:
    $ref: '#/definitions/Address'
  age:
    type: integer
    format: int32
    minimum: 0"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
<span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
- <span class="pl-s">name</span>
<span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">name</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">address</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/Address<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
  <span class="pl-ent">age</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int32</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">minimum</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Model with Map/Dictionary Properties</h6><a id="user-content-model-with-mapdictionary-properties" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Model with Map/Dictionary Properties" href="#model-with-mapdictionary-properties"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For a simple string to string mapping:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: object
additionalProperties:
  type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
<span class="pl-ent">additionalProperties</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">For a string to model mapping:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
  &quot;additionalProperties&quot;: {
    &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/ComplexModel&quot;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"additionalProperties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/ComplexModel"</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="type: object
additionalProperties:

  &quot;definitions&quot;: {
    &quot;ErrorModel&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
      &quot;required&quot;: [
        &quot;message&quot;,
        &quot;code&quot;
      ],
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;message&quot;: {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        },
        &quot;code&quot;: {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
          &quot;minimum&quot;: 100,
          &quot;maximum&quot;: 600
        }
      }
    },
    &quot;ExtendedErrorModel&quot;: {
      &quot;allOf&quot;: [
        {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/ErrorModel&quot;
        },
        {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
          &quot;required&quot;: [
            &quot;rootCause&quot;
          ],
          &quot;properties&quot;: {
            &quot;rootCause&quot;: {
              &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>

        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">100</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"maximum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">600</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"ExtendedErrorModel"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"allOf"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/ErrorModel"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

            <span class="pl-s">"rootCause"</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"properties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"rootCause"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
            <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;definitions&quot;: {
    &quot;Pet&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
      &quot;discriminator&quot;: &quot;petType&quot;,
      &quot;properties&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        },
        &quot;petType&quot;: {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        }
      },
      &quot;required&quot;: [
        &quot;name&quot;,
        &quot;petType&quot;
      ]
    },
    &quot;Cat&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A representation of a cat&quot;,
      &quot;allOf&quot;: [
        {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/Pet&quot;
        },
        {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
          &quot;properties&quot;: {
            &quot;huntingSkill&quot;: {
              &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
              &quot;description&quot;: &quot;The measured skill for hunting&quot;,
              &quot;default&quot;: &quot;lazy&quot;,
              &quot;enum&quot;: [
                &quot;clueless&quot;,
                &quot;lazy&quot;,
                &quot;adventurous&quot;,
                &quot;aggressive&quot;
              ]
            }
          },
          &quot;required&quot;: [
            &quot;huntingSkill&quot;
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    &quot;Dog&quot;: {
      &quot;description&quot;: &quot;A representation of a dog&quot;,
      &quot;allOf&quot;: [
        {
          &quot;$ref&quot;: &quot;#/definitions/Pet&quot;
        },
        {
          &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
          &quot;properties&quot;: {
            &quot;packSize&quot;: {
              &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
              &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int32&quot;,
              &quot;description&quot;: &quot;the size of the pack the dog is from&quot;,
              &quot;default&quot;: 0,
              &quot;minimum&quot;: 0
            }
          },
          &quot;required&quot;: [
            &quot;packSize&quot;
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"definitions"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"Pet"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"discriminator"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"petType"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"properties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"petType"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"petType"</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"Cat"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"A representation of a cat"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"allOf"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/Pet"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"properties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"huntingSkill"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"The measured skill for hunting"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"lazy"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"enum"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
                <span class="pl-s">"clueless"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
                <span class="pl-s">"lazy"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
                <span class="pl-s">"adventurous"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
                <span class="pl-s">"aggressive"</span>
              <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
            <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"huntingSkill"</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"Dog"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"A representation of a dog"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"allOf"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"$ref"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#/definitions/Pet"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

            <span class="pl-s">"packSize"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"int32"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"description"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"the size of the pack the dog is from"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"default"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
              <span class="pl-s">"minimum"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
            <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"required"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"packSize"</span>
          <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">]</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="definitions:
  Pet:
    type: object
    discriminator: petType
    properties:
      name:
        type: string
      petType:
        type: string
    required:
    - name
    - petType
  Cat:
    description: A representation of a cat
    allOf:
    - $ref: '#/definitions/Pet'
    - type: object
      properties:
        huntingSkill:
          type: string
          description: The measured skill for hunting
          default: lazy
          enum:
          - clueless
          - lazy
          - adventurous
          - aggressive
      required:
      - huntingSkill
  Dog:
    description: A representation of a dog
    allOf:
    - $ref: '#/definitions/Pet'
    - type: object
      properties:
        packSize:
          type: integer
          format: int32
          description: the size of the pack the dog is from
          default: 0
          minimum: 0
      required:
      - packSize"><pre><span class="pl-ent">definitions</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">Pet</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">discriminator</span>: <span class="pl-s">petType</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">petType</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
    - <span class="pl-s">name</span>
    - <span class="pl-s">petType</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">Cat</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A representation of a cat</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">allOf</span>:
    - <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
    - <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">huntingSkill</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">The measured skill for hunting</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">default</span>: <span class="pl-s">lazy</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">enum</span>:
          - <span class="pl-s">clueless</span>
          - <span class="pl-s">lazy</span>
          - <span class="pl-s">adventurous</span>
          - <span class="pl-s">aggressive</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
      - <span class="pl-s">huntingSkill</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">Dog</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">A representation of a dog</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">allOf</span>:
    - <span class="pl-ent">$ref</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>#/definitions/Pet<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>
    - <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">packSize</span>:
          <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int32</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">the size of the pack the dog is from</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">default</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
          <span class="pl-ent">minimum</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">required</span>:
      - <span class="pl-s">packSize</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Object</h4><a id="user-content-xml-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Object" href="#xml-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.</p>
<p dir="auto">When using arrays, XML element names are <em>not</em> inferred (for singular/plural forms) and the <code>name</code> property should be used to add that information. See examples for expected behavior.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fixed Fields</h5><a id="user-content-fixed-fields-14" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fixed Fields" href="#fixed-fields-14"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Name</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlname"></a>name</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property. When defined within the Items Object (<code>items</code>), it will affect the name of the individual XML elements within the list. When defined alongside <code>type</code> being <code>array</code> (outside the <code>items</code>), it will affect the wrapping element and only if <code>wrapped</code> is <code>true</code>. If <code>wrapped</code> is <code>false</code>, it will be ignored.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlnamespace"></a>namespace</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The URL of the namespace definition. Value SHOULD be in the form of a URL.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlprefix"></a>prefix</td>
<td align="center"><code>string</code></td>
<td>The prefix to be used for the <a href="#xmlName">name</a>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlattribute"></a>attribute</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element. Default value is <code>false</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlwrapped"></a>wrapped</td>
<td align="center"><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>MAY be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped (for example, <code>&lt;books&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;&lt;/books&gt;</code>) or unwrapped (<code>&lt;book/&gt;&lt;book/&gt;</code>). Default value is <code>false</code>. The definition takes effect only when defined alongside <code>type</code> being <code>array</code> (outside the <code>items</code>).</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Objects</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-objects-10" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Objects" href="#patterned-objects-10"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-xmlextensions"></a>^x-</td>
<td align="center">Any</td>
<td>Allows extensions to the Swagger Schema. The field name MUST begin with <code>x-</code>, for example, <code>x-internal-id</code>. The value can be <code>null</code>, a primitive, an array or an object. See <a href="#specification-extensions">Vendor Extensions</a> for further details.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Object Examples</h5><a id="user-content-xml-object-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Object Examples" href="#xml-object-examples"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The examples of the XML object definitions are included inside a property definition of a <a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a> with a sample of the XML representation of it.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">No XML Element</h6><a id="user-content-no-xml-element" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: No XML Element" href="#no-xml-element"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Basic string property:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;animals&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Basic string array property (<a href="#xmlWrapped"><code>wrapped</code></a> is <code>false</code> by default):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
    &quot;animals&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
        &quot;items&quot;: {
            &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
        }
    }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;animals&gt;...&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Name Replacement</h6><a id="user-content-xml-name-replacement" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Name Replacement" href="#xml-name-replacement"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"animal"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: string
  xml:
    name: animal"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;...&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Attribute, Prefix and Namespace</h6><a id="user-content-xml-attribute-prefix-and-namespace" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Attribute, Prefix and Namespace" href="#xml-attribute-prefix-and-namespace"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">In this example, a full model definition is shown.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;Person&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
    &quot;properties&quot;: {
      &quot;id&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
        &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int32&quot;,
        &quot;xml&quot;: {
          &quot;attribute&quot;: true
        }
      },
      &quot;name&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
        &quot;xml&quot;: {
          &quot;namespace&quot;: &quot;http://swagger.io/schema/sample&quot;,
          &quot;prefix&quot;: &quot;sample&quot;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"Person"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"properties"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"id"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"integer"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"format"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"int32"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"attribute"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"namespace"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"http://swagger.io/schema/sample"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
          <span class="pl-s">"prefix"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"sample"</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Person:
  type: object
  properties:
    id:
      type: integer
      format: int32
      xml:
        attribute: true
    name:
      type: string
      xml:
        namespace: http://swagger.io/schema/sample
        prefix: sample"><pre><span class="pl-ent">Person</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">object</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">properties</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">id</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">integer</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">format</span>: <span class="pl-s">int32</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">attribute</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
      <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
        <span class="pl-ent">namespace</span>: <span class="pl-s">http://swagger.io/schema/sample</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">prefix</span>: <span class="pl-s">sample</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;Person id=&quot;123&quot;&gt;
    &lt;sample:name xmlns:sample=&quot;http://swagger.io/schema/sample&quot;&gt;example&lt;/sample:name&gt;
&lt;/Person&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">Person</span> <span class="pl-e">id</span>=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>123<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>&gt;
    &lt;<span class="pl-ent">sample</span><span class="pl-ent">:</span><span class="pl-ent">name</span> <span class="pl-e">xmlns</span><span class="pl-e">:</span><span class="pl-e">sample</span>=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://swagger.io/schema/sample<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>&gt;example&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">sample</span><span class="pl-ent">:</span><span class="pl-ent">name</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">Person</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h6 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">XML Arrays</h6><a id="user-content-xml-arrays" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: XML Arrays" href="#xml-arrays"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Changing the element names:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"animal"</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">The external <code>name</code> property has no effect on the XML:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"animal"</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"aliens"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    name: aliens"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Even when the array is wrapped, if no name is explicitly defined, the same name will be used both internally and externally:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
  xml:
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;
  &lt;animals&gt;value&lt;/animals&gt;
  &lt;animals&gt;value&lt;/animals&gt;
&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">To overcome the above example, the following definition can be used:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"animal"</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;animals&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;/animals&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animals</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Affecting both internal and external names:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;,
      &quot;xml&quot;: {
        &quot;name&quot;: &quot;animal&quot;
      }
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;,
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"animal"</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"aliens"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
    xml:
      name: animal
  xml:
    name: aliens
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
      <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">animal</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;aliens&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
  &lt;animal&gt;value&lt;/animal&gt;
&lt;/aliens&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">animal</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">If we change the external element but not the internal ones:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;animals&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;array&quot;,
    &quot;items&quot;: {
      &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
    },
    &quot;xml&quot;: {
      &quot;name&quot;: &quot;aliens&quot;,
      &quot;wrapped&quot;: true
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"animals"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"array"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"items"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"string"</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"xml"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"aliens"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-s">"wrapped"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="animals:
  type: array
  items:
    type: string
  xml:
    name: aliens
    wrapped: true"><pre><span class="pl-ent">animals</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">array</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">items</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">type</span>: <span class="pl-s">string</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">xml</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">aliens</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">wrapped</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-xml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&lt;aliens&gt;
  &lt;aliens&gt;value&lt;/aliens&gt;
  &lt;aliens&gt;value&lt;/aliens&gt;
&lt;/aliens&gt;"><pre>&lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
  &lt;<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;value&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;
&lt;/<span class="pl-ent">aliens</span>&gt;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Definitions Object</h4><a id="user-content-definitions-object" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Definitions Object" href="#definitions-object"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">An object to hold data types that can be consumed and produced by operations. These data types can be primitives, arrays or models.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Patterned Fields</h5><a id="user-content-patterned-fields-7" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Patterned Fields" href="#patterned-fields-7"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Field Pattern</th>
<th align="center">Type</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><a name="user-content-definitionsname"></a>{name}</td>
<td align="center"><a href="#schema-object">Schema Object</a></td>
<td>A single definition, mapping a "name" to the schema it defines.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Definitions Object Example</h5><a id="user-content-definitions-object-example" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Definitions Object Example" href="#definitions-object-example"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;Category&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
    &quot;properties&quot;: {
      &quot;id&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
        &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int64&quot;
      },
      &quot;name&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
      }
    }
  },
  &quot;Tag&quot;: {
    &quot;type&quot;: &quot;object&quot;,
    &quot;properties&quot;: {
      &quot;id&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;integer&quot;,
        &quot;format&quot;: &quot;int64&quot;
      },
      &quot;name&quot;: {
        &quot;type&quot;: &quot;string&quot;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s">"Category"</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s">"type"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"object"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

      <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
